calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ross Madden for and with Everett Windom.

The Court informed Mr. Madden that the petition did not need a new case number. The Court stated that it read the declaration, that the property was purchased in 1962 with community funds, that title was taken as joint tenants in order to qualify for a loan and that it was always considered community property. Mr. Windom agreed. The Court granted the Petition for Spousal Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Chu. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-11-2017 Continued To Nov-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-02-2017 Continued To Oct-23-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ross Madden for Bryant Windom.

Mr. Madden stated that he was not aware this matter was on calendar and that he will answer the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to October 23, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
